title: KEMORELA Ribbed Glass Coffee Mug Set, 16oz Clear Glass Mugs with Handle, Coffee Bar Accessories, Durable Drinkware for Hot Beverages, Set of 2 Coffee Mugs
features: Chic Ribbed Design: The ribbed texture of these glass mugs adds a contemporary touch to any kitchen or dining table. Perfect for serving hot beverages like coffee, tea, and espresso in style.
16oz Generous Capacity: These clear glass coffee mugs hold up to 16oz of your favorite hot drink, offering the ideal size for enjoying coffee, tea, hot chocolate, or even a creamy cappuccino.

Multipurpose Drinkware: Whether you prefer hot coffee in the morning, tea in the afternoon, or espresso shots throughout the day, these glass cups are versatile enough to handle all your drinkware needs.

High-Quality Glass Construction: Made from sturdy, premium clear glass, these ribbed mugs are designed to withstand everyday use while maintaining their stylish look. They’re perfect for both casual and special occasions.

Easy to Clean: These glass coffee cups are dishwasher safe, offering hassle-free cleaning. The high-quality construction ensures that the glass stays clear and free from stains, even with frequent use.
